name: Goodyear (Thailand) Public Company Limited
summary: Goodyear (Thailand) Public Company Limited manufactures, distributes, and sells motor vehicle and aero tires in Thailand. The company also exports its products. The company was incorporated in 1968 and is headquartered in Pathumthani, Thailand. Goodyear (Thailand) Public Company Limited is a subsidiary of The Goodyear Tire & Rubber Company.
